Dynamically generated via setup_task.sh which explicitly outputs the starter file with this name.

Code analysis of verifier.py reveals that while "wall_creation" is requested in the prompt, the calculated "new_walls" value is completely ignored in the scoring logic, allowing a perfect score without any wall creation.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for sweet_home_3d_env bistro_restaurant_layout task by verifying that the initial .sh3d environment is synthetically generated via setup_task.sh by stripping furniture from an existing sample. Discovered a critical defect in the task evaluation logic: although the prompt explicitly requires the agent to build partition walls, the verifier entirely ignores the "new_walls" count in its scoring criteria, meaning an agent can achieve a perfect score of 100 without creating any walls.
